subject: Re: Perfect vessel
body:
whats the catch?


----- Original Message ----
From: Craig <Craig@penumbramarine.com>
To: dkiesq@aol.com; J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, October 8, 2007 8:21:19 PM
Subject: Perfect vessel


Darren,
 
70 pax, speed 28-32 kts w/ 1 x 890 hp, bow loader.  Vessels (2) can be purchased for around USD 150,000 each.
 
Regards,
 
Craig Tafoya
Penumbra Marine Logistics
(954) 328-6203
www.TafoyaYachts.com
www.CraigTafoya.com
